testResults.meaning: Safe preview gate passed; parity failures are reported and default Vue cutover remains blocked.
Safe V12 pre-cutover gate passed after V12-B guardrail changes.
All active routes were compared against the V11 route content contract and remain blocked for cutover.
Final strict parity correctly blocks Vue default cutover while P0/P1 route parity differences remain.

notes: Header and bottom bar geometry matched in the preview foundation.
Pixel, content and interaction parity failed for all four core routes.
The default production boot was intentionally left on the V11 legacy runtime.

knownP0Issues: Core Vue pages are not Golden Master complete.
LegacyContentBridge is placeholder-level and cannot be used for production cutover.
legacyApp.js still owns the default production runtime.
Active route migration status is incomplete.
